introSection: Big Apple is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SBF Visa Group currently located at M&D's Scotland's Theme Park in Motherwell, Strathclyde, Scotland, UK.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Yellow track and green supports. It originally featured pink track and unpainted supports, with the track later being repainted to yellow. The supports remained unpainted until it was sold and relocated.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Big Apple on the park's website

fullText:
Big Apple is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SBF Visa Group currently located at M&D's Scotland's Theme Park in Motherwell, Strathclyde, Scotland, UK.



Yellow track and green supports. It originally featured pink track and unpainted supports, with the track later being repainted to yellow. The supports remained unpainted until it was sold and relocated.

The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.


 * Big Apple on the park's website
